extract_meta.note: Re-extraction with corrected vcg_ids. Original directive had wrong IDs: 2484/2488/2489 -> corrected to 2493/2462/2463

groups.context_description: Term names understanding as a divine attribute — the infinite discernment by which God creates, orders, and governs all things
groups.issue: te.vu.nah H8394 — divine attribute — corrected vcg_id

anchor_verses.verse_text: Psa 147:5 Great is our Lord , and abundant in power ; his understanding is beyond measure .

related_verses.verse_text: Job 12:13 “With God are wisdom and might ; he has counsel and understanding .
Job 26:12 By his power he stilled the sea ; by his understanding he shattered Rahab .
Psa 136:5 to him who by understanding made the heavens , for his steadfast love endures forever ;
Pro 3:19 The Lord by wisdom founded the earth ; by understanding he established the heavens ;
Pro 21:30 No wisdom , no understanding , no counsel can avail against the Lord .
Isa 40:14 Whom did he consult , and who made him understand ? Who taught him the path of justice , and taught him knowledge , and showed him the way of understanding ?
Isa 40:28 Have you not known ? Have you not heard ? The Lord is the everlasting God , the Creator of the ends of the earth . He does not faint or grow weary ; his understanding is unsearchable .
Jer 10:12 It is he who made the earth by his power , who established the world by his wisdom , and by his understanding stretched out the heavens .
Jer 51:15 “It is he who made the earth by his power , who established the world by his wisdom , and by his understanding stretched out the heavens .

groups.context_description: Term names wisdom as a divine attribute — the infinite and incomprehensible understanding belonging to God alone
groups.issue: sofia G4678 — divine attribute — corrected vcg_id

anchor_verses.verse_text: Rom 11:33 Oh , the depth of the riches and wisdom and knowledge of God ! How unsearchable are his judgments and how inscrutable his ways !
1Cor 1:24 but to those who are called , both Jews and Greeks , Christ the power of God and the wisdom of God .

related_verses.verse_text: Eph 3:10 so that through the church the manifold wisdom of God might now be made known to the rulers and authorities in the heavenly places .
Col 2:3 in whom are hidden all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge .
Rev 7:12 saying , “ Amen ! Blessing and glory and wisdom and thanksgiving and honor and power and might be to our God forever and ever ! Amen .”

groups.context_description: Term names wisdom as the person of Christ — incarnate divine wisdom through whom God's purposes are revealed and enacted
groups.issue: sofia G4678 — wisdom as person of Christ — corrected vcg_id

anchor_verses.verse_text: 1Cor 1:30 And because of him you are in Christ Jesus , who became to us wisdom from God , righteousness and sanctification and redemption ,
Col 1:28 Him we proclaim , warning everyone and teaching everyone with all wisdom , that we may present everyone mature in Christ .

related_verses.verse_text: 1Cor 2:6 Yet among the mature we do impart wisdom , although it is not a wisdom of this age or of the rulers of this age , who are doomed to pass away .
1Cor 2:7 But we impart a secret and hidden wisdom of God , which God decreed before the ages for our glory .
Eph 1:17 that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ , the Father of glory , may give you the Spirit of wisdom and of revelation in the knowledge of him ,
Col 1:9 And so , from the day we heard , we have not ceased to pray for you , asking that you may be filled with the knowledge of his will in all spiritual wisdom and understanding ,
Col 3:16 Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly , teaching and admonishing one another in all wisdom , singing psalms and hymns and spiritual songs , with thankfulness in your hearts to God .
Jam 1:5 If any of you lacks wisdom , let him ask God , who gives generously to all without reproach , and it will be given him .
Jam 3:17 But the wisdom from above is first pure , then peaceable , gentle , open to reason , full of mercy and good fruits , impartial and sincere .
